evals.prompt: Write a 1500-word thought leadership article about how AI agents will transform software development, targeted at technical CTOs.
evals.expected_output: Structured article with strong thesis, concrete examples, no generic filler phrases

evals.prompt: 帮我写一篇关于量子计算商业化进展的深度文章，目标读者是有技术背景的投资人，1200 字左右。
evals.expected_output: 有论点、有数据、有结构的中文长文，避免套话

evals.prompt: I need a blog post explaining why most AI startups fail at the go-to-market stage. Make it opinionated and data-driven.
evals.expected_output: Opinionated article with clear argument structure and supporting evidence
